code:
import io
import string

fn main() -> Unit
  let line = match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end
  let n = string.len(line)
  mut total = 0
  mut i = 0
  mut cur = 0
  mut in_num = false
  mut done = false
  while i < n
    let b = match string.byte_at(line, i)
    when Some(v)
      v
    when None
      0
    end
    let is_digit = b >= 48 and b <= 57
    if is_digit
      cur = cur * 10 + (b - 48)
      in_num = true
    else
      if in_num
        if not done
          let next_total = total + cur
          if next_total > 100
            done = true
          else
            total = next_total
          end
        end
        cur = 0
        in_num = false
      end
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  if in_num
    if not done
      let next_total = total + cur
      if next_total <= 100
        total = next_total
      end
    end
  end
  println("total=#{total}")
end
